issues.sample: WHEN ATTEMPTING TO START THE VAN IT WILL PERIODICALLY NOT ENGAGE. THE GEAR SELECTOR WILL BLINK WHEN YOU SELECT A GEAR, BUT IT WILL NOT RESPOND TO THROTTLE. THE VEHICLE WILL ROLL HOWEVER. THIS BECOMES A GREATER PROBLEM AS YOU NEED TO REMOVE YOUR FOOT FROM THE BRAKE TO CYCLE THE VA

narrative.headline: What 2021 Chrysler Pacifica owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 344 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (41% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
